Text.Page:
I need to get home! I won't stay here anymore. I can't.

If you find {@LinkCreature:209#1011$$Jascus}, tell him I'm getting out of here one way or another.

I won't wait around to be food!

He thinks he's going to get out? Poor soldier's been driven mad by this place. I wish I could say he was the first.

We can't escort him out, if that's what he's hoping for. He can run for Castanica or Cutthroat Harbor if he likes, but he's on his own.

You found him? No way out? That's...just what he wants me to think.

He's with them! With the gulas! I suspected as much!

He'll hand me over if he finds me! I've got to run!
